mapper.insert: INSERT INTO xeus.gis_lyr_thm( lyr_mgr_seq, thm_field_id, thm_field_nm, thm_field_typ, thm_start_val, thm_end_val, stroke_color, stroke_width, stroke_line_dash, fill_color, text_text_align, text_text_baseline, text_font, text_text, text_fill_color, text_stroke_color, text_stroke_width, text_offset_x, text_offset_y, text_rotation, text_min_resolution, text_max_resolution, circle_radius, calc_method, icon_mgr_seq ) VALUES ( #{lyrMgrSeq}::numeric, #{thmFieldId}, #{thmFieldNm}, #{thmFieldTyp}, #{thmStartVal}, #{thmEndVal}, #{strokeColor}, #{strokeWidth}, #{strokeLineDash}, #{fillColor}, #{textTextAlign}, #{textTextBaseline}, #{textFont}, #{textText}, #{textFillColor}, #{textStrokeColor}, #{textStrokeWidth}, #{textOffsetX}::numeric, #{textOffsetY}::numeric, #{textRotation}::numeric, #{textMinResolution}, #{textMaxResolution}, #{circleRadius}::numeric, #{calcMethod}, #{iconMgrSeq}::numeric );

insert.foreach: INSERT INTO xeus.gis_lyr_thm( lyr_mgr_seq, thm_field_id, thm_field_nm, thm_field_typ, thm_start_val, thm_end_val, stroke_color, stroke_width, stroke_line_dash, fill_color, text_text_align, text_text_baseline, text_font, text_text, text_fill_color, text_stroke_color, text_stroke_width, text_offset_x, text_offset_y, text_rotation, text_min_resolution, text_max_resolution, circle_radius, calc_method, icon_mgr_seq ) VALUES ( #{vo.lyrMgrSeq}::numeric, #{vo.thmFieldId}, #{vo.thmFieldNm}, #{vo.thmFieldTyp}, #{vo.thmStartVal}, #{vo.thmEndVal}, #{vo.strokeColor}, #{vo.strokeWidth}, #{vo.strokeLineDash}, #{vo.fillColor}, #{vo.textTextAlign}, #{vo.textTextBaseline}, #{vo.textFont}, #{vo.textText}, #{vo.textFillColor}, #{vo.textStrokeColor}, #{vo.textStrokeWidth}, #{vo.textOffsetX}::numeric, #{vo.textOffsetY}::numeric, #{vo.textRotation}::numeric, #{vo.textFillColor}, #{vo.textStrokeColor}, #{vo.circleRadius}::numeric, #{vo.calcMethod}, #{vo.iconMgrSeq}::numeric );
